prompt:
You have the Superpowers plugin installed (v5.0.4). Do NOT use brainstorming. Go directly to implementation.

## Task

Update the anthropic-blog-study repository with 6 missing articles from Anthropic's Engineering Blog. For each article:

1. Fetch the full article from the URL
2. Create the directory structure: `<slug>/META.md`, `<slug>/README_EN.md`, `<slug>/README_CN.md`
3. Follow the EXACT format of existing articles (see `building-effective-agents/` as reference)

### Articles to add (newest first):

1. **infrastructure-noise** — https://www.anthropic.com/engineering/infrastructure-noise
   "Quantifying infrastructure noise in agentic coding evals"

2. **eval-awareness-browsecomp** — https://www.anthropic.com/engineering/eval-awareness-browsecomp
   "Eval awareness in Claude Opus 4.6's BrowseComp performance" (Mar 06, 2026)

3. **building-c-compiler** — https://www.anthropic.com/engineering/building-c-compiler
   "Building a C compiler with a team of parallel Claudes" (Feb 05, 2026)

4. **AI-resistant-technical-evaluations** — https://www.anthropic.com/engineering/AI-resistant-technical-evaluations
   "Designing AI-resistant technical evaluations" (Jan 21, 2026)

5. **desktop-extensions** — https://www.anthropic.com/engineering/desktop-extensions
   "Desktop Extensions: One-click MCP server installation for Claude Desktop" (Jun 26, 2025)

6. **swe-bench-sonnet** — https://www.anthropic.com/engineering/swe-bench-sonnet
   "Raising the bar on SWE-bench Verified with Claude 3.5 Sonnet" (Jan 06, 2025)

### Format Reference

Each article directory must contain exactly 3 files:

**META.md** — Structured metadata table:
```markdown
# META — <Article Title>

| 字段 | 内容 |
|------|------|
| **名称** | <English Title> |
| **中文名** | <Chinese Title> |
| **链接** | <URL> |
| **来源** | Anthropic Engineering Blog |
| **发布时间** | <Date> |
| **分类** | Engineering / <Category> |
| **作者** | Anthropic Engineering Team |
| **阅读时长** | ~X 分钟 |
| **难度** | <Level> |

## 摘要
<2-3 paragraph Chinese summary>

## 相关文件
- [English Notes](README_EN.md)
- [中文笔记](README_CN.md)
```

**README_EN.md** — Structured English study notes:
- Key concepts and insights
- Architecture/design patterns discussed
- Code examples (if any)
- Practical takeaways

**README_CN.md** — Structured Chinese study notes:
- 核心概念和洞见
- 架构/设计模式
- 实践要点
- 与其他文章的关联

### Quality Standards
- READ each article thoroughly before writing notes
- Notes should capture insights, not just summarize — what can a developer LEARN from this?
- Chinese notes are NOT just translations — they should have Chinese developer perspective
- Cross-reference with existing articles where relevant (e.g., building-effective-agents, effective-context-engineering)

### After all articles are added:
1. Update README.md with the new articles in the article list
2. Commit each article as a separate commit: `feat: add <slug> study notes`
3. Final commit: `docs: update README with new articles`

## Git
- Work directly on `main` branch (this is a documentation repo, no Gitflow needed)
- Push after all articles are complete
